summary: LLM Learning Pipeline Gap Fixes testing completed. All 27 backend tests passed. Verified: (1) GET /api/knowledge-seed/status returns comprehensive metrics with overall=good, (2) POST /api/knowledge-seed/close-all-gaps runs all gap closers without errors, (3) POST /api/feedback-loop/replay shows 0 unapplied events (no infinite replay loop), (4) VEP profiles seeded from BC cache (469 profiles), (5) Classification corrections enriched with text_snippet (6/6), (6) Feedback events 100% applied (51/51).
critical_code_review_comments: Code review confirms all gap fixes are properly implemented:
1. knowledge_seed.py close-all-gaps endpoint correctly orchestrates all gap closers
2. classification_feedback_service.py get_few_shot_examples() no longer requires text_snippet (line 234-241)
5. feedback_loop_service.py _apply_immediate_feedback marks unlearnable events as applied (line 136-144)
6. vendor_extraction_profile_service.py seed_from_bc_cache creates VEP profiles from BC data (line 384-464)
7. knowledge_seed_service.py seed_sender_domain_mappings checks both 'sender' and 'sender_email' fields (line 217-219)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing knowledge base data
context_for_next_testing_agent: LLM Learning Pipeline Gap Fixes fully tested. Key metrics verified: VEP=469 (up from 13), Aliases=963, Feedback=51/51 (100% applied), Corrections=6 with text_snippet. All endpoints working: /api/knowledge-seed/status (overall=good), /api/knowledge-seed/close-all-gaps (success=true, no errors), /api/feedback-loop/replay (total=0 unapplied), /api/feedback-loop/health (comprehensive stats). The close-all-gaps endpoint is idempotent and safe to call multiple times.
